criteria_negotiation.prompt: Please propose 2-4 acceptance criteria for the current slice. Split them into must-have current-task criteria and follow-up criteria. Include the verification you expect for each.
suggested_actions: Ask the worker to split must-have current-task criteria from follow-up criteria.
Record accepted current-task criteria with workerctl criteria manager-test-phone-lunk-qa-slice-20260519 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status accepted.
Record proposed current-task criteria with workerctl criteria manager-test-phone-lunk-qa-slice-20260519 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status proposed.
Record follow-up criteria with workerctl criteria manager-test-phone-lunk-qa-slice-20260519 --add --criterion "..." --source worker_proposed --status deferred.

acceptance_criteria: Worker updates the existing manager-test-app PR #1 branch or opens a clearly linked follow-up PR, and leaves it unmerged.
The app includes real browser audio alarm playback with a user-controlled enable/disable path.
Camera permission, unsupported-browser, and error states are clearer than before.
README includes a short manual QA script for the new alarm and camera states.
Worker reports npm run lint, npm run test, and npm run build results, with failures explained if any.
guidelines: Use /Users/neonwatty/Desktop/codex-terminal-manager/scripts/workerctl from the app cwd; do not edit project files yourself.
Prefer observation and evidence review over interruption unless the worker is stuck or scope drifts.
